content.speakerText: Good morning, can you confirm your name and thesis title?
content.speakerTextCn: 早上好，请确认一下你的名字和论文题目？
expectedAnswers: Good morning. I'm Li Wei, and my thesis is titled 'AI in Higher Education'.
Morning, Professor Smith. My name is Li Wei. My research is called 'AI in Higher Education'.
Good morning. I'm Li Wei, a PhD candidate in Education Technology. My thesis explores the application of artificial intelligence in higher education institutions.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确回应了姓名和论文标题
语言准确性：语法正确，无拼写或搭配错误
表达自然度：语气正式、流畅，符合学术场景
关键词覆盖：使用了 'thesis', 'name', 'title' 或类似表达

content.speakerText: Thanks for coming in today. Ready to get started?
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢今天到场，准备好了吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, I'm fully prepared and looking forward to presenting my research.
Absolutely. I've spent months refining this work and am eager to share it with you.
Ready and excited — thank you for the opportunity.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确回应准备就绪，态度积极
语言准确性：使用恰当的动词短语如 'looking forward to', 'eager to'
表达自然度：语调自信，避免过度口语化或犹豫
关键词覆盖：使用了 'prepared', 'present', 'research', 'excited' 等关键词

content.speakerText: Welcome to the committee. Could you please introduce yourself briefly?
content.speakerTextCn: 欢迎来到委员会。请简单介绍一下自己？
expectedAnswers: Good morning. I'm Li Wei, a PhD candidate in Educational Technology at Beijing University. My thesis examines AI-driven learning analytics in graduate programs.
Thank you. I'm Li Wei. My research focuses on how artificial intelligence is transforming teaching and assessment in higher education.
I'm Li Wei. I've been working on AI applications in education for the past three years, and this thesis summarizes my key findings.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰介绍姓名、身份和研究主题
语言准确性：语法结构完整，用词专业，无中式英语
表达自然度：语速适中，逻辑清晰，有学术口吻
关键词覆盖：使用了 'PhD candidate', 'thesis', 'research', 'AI', 'higher education' 等核心术语
